personalInfo.name: Parmeet Singh
personalInfo.title: Software Development Engineer
personalInfo.description: 3+ years of experience building scalable applications and innovative solutions

description: Contributing to the development of Jio Frames, a next-gen mixed-reality wearable product similar to Apple Vision Pro, focused on immersive spatial computing experiences.
Building real-time speech-to-text (STT) and text-to-speech (TTS) pipelines to enable voice interaction in XR environments.
Setting up backend infrastructure using Node.js, gRPC, and WebSockets for low-latency, real-time audio communication.
Collaborating with AI and hardware teams to integrate voice-driven features into augmented reality use cases.
Implemented health checks and monitoring systems, resulting in a 99.9% increase in up-time.
Implemented tools such as Husky and established CI/CD processes to streamline pull request reviews and minimize manual effort.
Engineered a subscription management system with Stripe, automating payment processing, subscription renewals, and cancellations, leading to increased revenue and enhanced user satisfaction.
Deployed code execution engines on servers instead of relying on a managed service, reducing operational costs to zero while ensuring high availability and seamless functionality.
Developed a custom rate-limiting and bot detection algorithm to block spam signups and mitigate botnet attacks without using paid services, ensuring platform security and performance.
Developed application programming interfaces for seamless communication with and storage of predictions from machine learning servers.
Architected and optimized databases to store and process data from OMNX servers, enabling asynchronous handling of large number of files and reducing latency.
Generation of comma-separated files from multiple records to enhance user experience and solved complex technical challenges to create a robust and fault-tolerant back-end infrastructure.

projects.title: SolveWatch AI
projects.description: AI-powered interview assistant desktop app that captures screenshots, extracts text via OCR, and generates solutions using a multi-provider AI failover system
features: Built a real-time desktop application that captures screenshots during coding interviews, extracts text via OCR, and generates AI-powered solutions using a multi-provider failover system (OpenAI GPT-4o, Groq LLaMA-70B, Google Gemini) with automatic provider health tracking and retry logic

Designed a dual-modal input pipeline supporting both visual input (screenshot OCR) and audio input (real-time transcription via WebSocket), enabling seamless problem ingestion in live interview scenarios

Implemented 5 specialized prompt templates (debug, theory, coding, transcription, context) with a hot-swappable prompt system allowing the same problem to be re-analyzed from different angles without re-processing
Built a real-time WebSocket event streaming architecture with per-connection state isolation, enabling fine-grained UI feedback across 13+ events (OCR start/complete, AI processing, errors)
Packaged as an Electron desktop app with a HUD overlay (Cmd+Shift+H) and native macOS integration (screenshot capture, Retina scaling, mouse tracking, clipboard access)

projects.title: FitXperts
projects.description: A full-stack fitness tracking platform where users can log exercise sessions, build custom workout plans, and visualize fitness progress over time
features: Built a REST API with Express.js and Supabase (PostgreSQL + Row-Level Security for data isolation)
Implemented an AI-powered fitness recommendation engine using the OpenAI API
Developed an analytics dashboard with interactive charts (Recharts) showing strength progression, volume trends, and workout history
Added a social/friends feature for sharing progress and integrated a TTL in-memory caching layer to reduce database load on analytics endpoints
Configured drag-and-drop exercise ordering (dnd-kit) and form management (React Hook Form); deployed on Vercel with separate backend and frontend services

projects.title: Curl-Logger
projects.description: A npm package to log curl-request on the console
features: Middleware for every request to log all the request metadata
Ability to write Comma separated files on the server that would be appended to every request in order to have a complete list of curl requests to avoid hassle
Reduced debugging time for API-related issues by creating a developer-friendly solution to trace HTTP requests with minimal overhead

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science

education.institution: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University, Delhi
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology

interests: Passionate about building scalable systems, exploring new technologies, and solving complex problems
